description: Run a BMAD Epic autonomously to a deterministic, TEA-gated Definition-of-Done: preflight to a remediated green light, define done as executable tests, advance only on a machine-checked gate verdict.
args: {--light: trace gate only}|{--parallel: experimental worktree fan-out}|{-H: headless}|{--yes: skip open-floor invite + launch confirm}|{--retro: close-out retrospective}

description: Run the standalone formalize readiness gate over an Epic's planning artifacts: auto-remediate machine-derivable gaps, route JUDGMENT candidates to one throwaway subagent, and adapt the ready/remediable/blocked verdict into the canonical five-key headless envelope.
args: {-H: headless five-key JSON envelope}|{<epic>: target epic id}
